query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title_ar,
  CASE 
    WHEN content_markdown LIKE '%https://files.manuscdn.com%' THEN 'Has external images'
    WHEN content_markdown LIKE '%![%' THEN 'Has markdown images'
    ELSE 'No images found'
  END as image_status,
  CASE 
    WHEN content_markdown LIKE '%وصف بصري%' THEN 'Has visual placeholder'
    ELSE 'No placeholder'
  END as placeholder_status
FROM lessons
WHERE id IN (19, 22, 26, 29, 32)
ORDER BY id;

    WHEN content_markdown LIKE '%![%' THEN 'Has markdown images'

  END as image_status,
  CASE 
    WHEN content_markdown LIKE '%وصف بصري%' THEN 'Has visual placeholder'
    ELSE 'No placeholder'

FROM lessons
